reviews.review_description: Simple game, but challenging as you move up the levels. Fun to play and worth the price.

reviews.review_title: I want this out of my library.
reviews.review_description:
I need a mean to delete this game from my library.

It's not the worst game ever, but it's ugly, empty, and despite of the dev efforts, compared to other games, the hunting is bland, repetitive. 

But the first reason I want it out of my library is that I hate hunting games where the prays have no chance to fight back.
The second is that the game doesn't let you move in the 3D landscapes: you aim at runing dinos (an extinct species that are not threatening you in any way), and fire? Just no.
I was expecting close quarters combat, and having to run both to flee and to chase. Was disappointed big time.
I played like 50 times the swamp level before quitting for good.How difficult a boring game can be??
I haven’t made it past the tutorial, but what I’ve seen of the game the graphics are basic.  Pretty tough game for me and a waste of money.
